items.title: Santiment flags risk as crypto bullish talk spikes while BTC holds $80K
items.summary: The increase in bullish versus bearish crypto commentary on social media has Santiment warning that the recent crypto market rally may be short-lived.

items.title: CZ says crypto exchange rivals opposed his pardon bid
items.summary: Binance co-founder Changpeng “CZ” Zhao said rival crypto exchanges were concerned a pardon could pave the way for Binance to return to the US market.

items.title: It might be too late for bitcoin’s quantum migration, Project Eleven report argues
items.summary: Quantum computing does not only pose a risk to up to $3 trillion in digital assets, it also threatens the security of banking systems, military communications, digital identities and more, Project Eleven’s report warns.

items.title: Why a 2017 Linux bug is now a major concern for the crypto industry
items.summary: The “Copy Fail” Linux bug could impact crypto infrastructure that relies on Linux servers, highlighting growing cybersecurity risks in the digital asset industry. Format: Explained

items.title: ECB's Lagarde’s digital euro warning: Why Europe shouldn’t just copy the U.S. stablecoin model
items.summary: Lagarde warned that large stablecoins like Tether and USDC, which now dominate a $310 billion market, pose financial stability risks and could transmit stress to underlying asset markets during periods of turmoil.

items.title: Crypto exchanges pushed US lawmakers to bar provision on risky tokens: Report
items.summary: Three companies reportedly pressed US senators for changes to a crypto bill, removing language that would require them to offer trading on tokens “not readily susceptible to manipulation.”

items.title: Estonia's FSA issues investor warning about Zondacrypto
items.summary: The news follows an investigation into the crypto exchange by Polish law enforcement officials and reports of customer withdrawal issues.

items.title: Bitcoin’s ‘overbought’ signal flashes price top warning with focus on $78K
items.summary: Bitcoin’s 36% rally from $60,000 resulted in the relative strength index flashing a potential top signal not seen since early 2026.

items.title: Trump Media’s Q1 loss widens to $406 million on bitcoin, CRO markdowns
items.summary: The loss was primarily driven by $244 million in unrealized losses on cryptocurrency holdings and an additional $108.2 million investment loss.

items.title: Sports betting should be regulated as a financial product, not gambling, aspiring prediction market provider says
items.summary: Novig CEO Jacob Fortinsky said his company will transition to a federal Designated Contract Market framework this summer to launch in all 50 states, while 57 Maiden's Adam Mastrelli said he was banned from two major sportsbooks within two months for being “sharp."

items.title: Crypto industry cheers Senate Clarity Act markup date as market structure push resumes
items.summary: The bill's progress follows talks on jurisdiction, consumer/developer protections, and stablecoin rewards, with crypto firms backing a yield compromise.

items.title: Emerging-market users are treating crypto exchanges like banking apps, Binance says
items.summary: One point three billion adults lack financial services, 4.7 billion lack credit, and 1.4 billion savers in low-income nations earn no deposit interest, Binance said.

items.title: Swiss central bank bitcoin reserve push fails over signature shortfall
items.summary: The initiative sought to amend Switzerland's constitution, requiring the Swiss National Bank (SNB) to hold BTC alongside gold and foreign-currency reserves.

items.title: CME is set to let traders bet on bitcoin volatility, not just price
items.summary: CME Group plans to launch bitcoin volatility futures on June 1 pending regulatory approval bringing a easy way to bet on the degree of price swings.

items.title: How DeFi is changing the financial landscape for Latin Americans
items.summary: DeFi is quietly shifting from niche crypto experiment to a legitimate financial tool across the region, explains Serrano.

items.title: Crypto wallets are being rebuilt for AI agents, Trust Wallet and Mesh executives say at Consensus Miami
items.summary: Trust Wallet CEO Felix Fan and Mesh CTO Arjun Mukherjee said AI agents are creating a new role for crypto wallets.

items.title: BlackRock deepens tokenization push with new onchain fund offerings
items.summary: The world's largest asset manager filed paperwork to expand its tokenized fund lineup as real-world assets grow 200% year over year.

items.title: LayerZero says it ‘made a mistake’ in $292 Million Kelp exploit
items.summary: After initially framing the exploit as a developer configuration failure, LayerZero said it “owns” the decision to let its own verifier secure high-value transfers in a vulnerable setup.

items.title: Judge clears path for Aave to move $71 million in ETH linked to North Korea hack
items.summary: Judge Margaret Garnett allowed frozen exploit funds on Arbitrum to move to Aave, but the legal freeze follows the assets as terrorism plaintiffs continue their claim.

items.title: Seven major Bitcoin mining pools join Stratum V2, working group
items.summary: Individual miners in Bitcoin mining pools must rely on block templates provided by the mining pool operator.
